name: Telemedicine Platforms
description: Virtual medical consultations via video and mobile apps.
details: Telemedicine platforms allow patients to consult doctors remotely using secure video conferencing systems. They improve healthcare access in rural areas, reduce hospital congestion, and support continuous monitoring of chronic diseases.

name: Electronic Health Records (EHR)
description: Digital storage of patient medical records.
details: EHR systems store patient data such as history, prescriptions, lab results, and diagnoses. They improve coordination between healthcare providers and reduce medical errors.

name: AI Diagnostic Systems
description: AI tools that assist in disease detection.
details: AI diagnostic systems analyze scans, symptoms, and medical data to detect diseases like cancer and pneumonia earlier and more accurately than traditional methods.

name: Wearable Health Monitors
description: Smart devices that track vital signs.
details: Wearables like smartwatches track heart rate, oxygen levels, sleep, and activity levels to support preventive healthcare.

name: Robotic Surgery Systems
details: Robotic systems assist surgeons in performing minimally invasive procedures with higher precision and faster recovery times.

name: Remote Patient Monitoring
details: Medical devices collect patient data remotely, helping doctors track chronic conditions without hospital visits.

name: Medical Imaging AI
description: AI analysis of X-rays and MRI scans.
details: AI improves radiology accuracy by detecting abnormalities in medical images faster than manual interpretation.

name: Smart Insulin Systems
details: These systems adjust insulin doses automatically based on real-time glucose readings.

name: Clinical Decision Support Systems
description: Systems that assist doctors in decision-making.
details: These systems analyze patient data and provide treatment recommendations to reduce medical errors.

name: Blockchain Health Records
details: Blockchain ensures patient data security, transparency, and control over medical information sharing.

name: Virtual Reality Therapy
description: VR used in mental health and pain therapy.
details: VR therapy is used to treat anxiety, PTSD, and pain management through immersive environments.

name: Smart Hospital IoT Systems
details: IoT systems monitor equipment, patients, and hospital environments in real time to improve efficiency.

name: Genomic Medicine
details: Genomic medicine uses DNA analysis to personalize treatments for patients.

name: Nanomedicine
details: Nanomedicine delivers drugs directly to affected cells, improving treatment accuracy and reducing side effects.

name: Predictive Health Analytics
details: Uses AI and big data to predict disease risks before symptoms appear.

name: Digital Prescription Systems
details: Doctors send prescriptions digitally to pharmacies, reducing errors and improving efficiency.
